# LoanInCA

LoanInCA is a Chinese-English bilingual California mortgage guidance website led by David Dai, NMLS# 2454756.

## Core Services
- Home Purchase: https://www.loaninca.com/
- Refinance: https://www.loaninca.com/refinance-california
- DSCR Investment Property Loan: https://www.loaninca.com/dscr-loan-california
- Jumbo Loan: https://www.loaninca.com/jumbo-loan-california
- H1B / OPT Mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/opt-home-loan-california
- Bank Statement Loan: https://www.loaninca.com/bank-statement-loan-california
- Self-Employed Mortgage: https://www.loaninca.com/self-employed-mortgage-california
- Doctor Loan: https://www.loaninca.com/doctor-loan-california

## Compliance Notes
- NMLS: 2454756
- Equal Housing Lender
- Information on this site is educational and does not constitute a loan approval or rate lock.
- Final qualification, rates, fees, approval, and closing terms depend on lender review, market conditions, credit, income, assets, and property details.
